scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases, architectures, single-base, multi-base shorthand and explicit forms, cross-compilation, and architecture-independent builds. Matches gold standard well with additional correct details.
scores.hallucination_notes: Mentions 'riscv64' as a supported architecture in platforms list without qualification (gold standard doesn't list it as supported), and references '--platform <name>' flag and 'CRAFT_PLATFORM' env var which may not exist. Minor inaccuracies rather than fabricated core APIs.
